description: Katherine Green was appointed Director General for Labour Market and Skills in September 2025. Before that, she was in a jobshare with Sophie Dean as joint Directors General for DWP Policy. Before  DWP , Katherine and Sophie were Directors General for Borders and Trade in HMRC . They were responsible for policy and operation of the UK border for goods and delivered the major border change programme for Brexit. Katherine and Sophie joined  HMRC  in August 2018 as job share Directors of Customs and Border Design.  Katherine was previously Operations Director at HM Treasury. Prior to that she worked in a variety of policy roles in HM Treasury.  Before joining the Civil Service, Katherine worked in academia.

details.body:
Katherine Green was appointed Director General for Labour Market and Skills in September 2025. Before that, she was in a jobshare with Sophie Dean as joint Directors General for DWP Policy.

Before DWP, Katherine and Sophie were Directors General for Borders and Trade in HMRC. They were responsible for policy and operation of the UK border for goods and delivered the major border change programme for Brexit. Katherine and Sophie joined HMRC in August 2018 as job share Directors of Customs and Border Design. 

Katherine was previously Operations Director at HM Treasury. Prior to that she worked in a variety of policy roles in HM Treasury. 

Before joining the Civil Service, Katherine worked in academia.

Katherine Green was appointed Director General for Labour Market and Skills in September 2025. Before that, she was in a jobshare with Sophie Dean as joint Directors General for DWP Policy.

Before DWP, Katherine and Sophie were Directors General for Borders and Trade in HMRC. They were responsible for policy and operation of the UK border for goods and delivered the major border change programme for Brexit. Katherine and Sophie joined HMRC in August 2018 as job share Directors of Customs and Border Design. 

Katherine was previously Operations Director at HM Treasury. Prior to that she worked in a variety of policy roles in HM Treasury. 

Before joining the Civil Service, Katherine worked in academia.

The Director General for Labour Market and Skills is responsible for: 

  • Development and implementation of labour market strategy and policy, including programmes to reduce inactivity and the Youth Guarantee, and devolution of employment support to local authorities 

  • Leading DWP outcomes in the labour market, ensuring a joined-up approach across work, health and skills

  • Adult Skills policy and implementation including Skills England, Apprenticeships, Adult Skills Funding, and post-19 careers

role.title: Director General for Labour Market and Skills

role_appointments.title: Katherine Green - Director General for Labour Market and Skills

Katherine Green was appointed Director General for Labour Market and Skills in September 2025. Before that, she was in a jobshare with Sophie Dean as joint Directors General for DWP Policy.

Before DWP, Katherine and Sophie were Directors General for Borders and Trade in HMRC. They were responsible for policy and operation of the UK border for goods and delivered the major border change programme for Brexit. Katherine and Sophie joined HMRC in August 2018 as job share Directors of Customs and Border Design. 

Katherine was previously Operations Director at HM Treasury. Prior to that she worked in a variety of policy roles in HM Treasury. 

Before joining the Civil Service, Katherine worked in academia.

The Director General for Labour Market and Poverty is responsible for: 

  • Development and implementation of labour market strategy and policy 

  • Poverty strategy, including departmental poverty policy and the Child Poverty Taskforce 

  • Families, Child Maintenance and Disadvantaged Groups policy
